'''wangava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoalignment|pseudoalignment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoalignment|pseudoalignment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wangava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wængævæth|wængævæth]] || [[word:wængævæj|wængævæj]] || [[word:wængævæsh|wængævæsh]] || [[word:wængævæ|wængævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangangavath|wangangavath]] || [[word:wangangavaj|wangangavaj]] || [[word:wangangavash|wangangavash]] || [[word:wangangava|wangangava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangavath|wangavath]] || [[word:wangavaj|wangavaj]] || [[word:wangavash|wangavash]] || [[word:wangava|wangava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangafvath|wangafvath]] || [[word:wangafvaj|wangafvaj]] || [[word:wangafvash|wangafvash]] || [[word:wangafvaf|wangafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wangavatha|wangavatha]] || [[word:wangavaja|wangavaja]] || [[word:wangavasha|wangavasha]] || [[word:wangavaka|wangavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wangavath|wangavath]] || [[word:wangavaj|wangavaj]] || [[word:wangavash|wangavash]] || [[word:wangava|wangava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wangavathal|wangavathal]] || [[word:wangavajal|wangavajal]] || [[word:wangavashal|wangavashal]] || [[word:wangavakal|wangavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wangavathatha|wangavathatha]] || [[word:wangavajaja|wangavajaja]] || [[word:wangavashasha|wangavashasha]] || [[word:wangavaka|wangavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wangavathan|wangavathan]] || [[word:wangavajan|wangavajan]] || [[word:wangavashan|wangavashan]] || [[word:wangavakan|wangavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wangavathaoro|wangavathaoro]] || [[word:wangavajaoro|wangavajaoro]] || [[word:wangavashaoro|wangavashaoro]] || [[word:wangavakaoro|wangavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
